settings.heading: Shipping & Cash on Delivery
settings.content: We offer 100% Cash on Delivery (COD) and fast express shipping across India. Orders are typically shipped within 24 hours and delivered in 3 to 5 business days.

settings.heading: The Kannauj Heritage (100% Alcohol-Free)
settings.content: Each drop of Mahekh attar is distilled using traditional copper pots (Degs) and clay receivers (Bhapkas) in Kannauj, the perfume capital of India. We source only 100% pure natural blossoms and sandalwood oil base with zero alcohol.

settings.title: Fragrance Profile & Scent Notes
settings.subtitle: THE OLFACTORY EXPERIENCE
settings.top_note_desc: An invigorating opening of green bel blossoms and citrus notes that creates a refreshing aura.
settings.heart_note_desc: A rich, creamy heart of pure saffron threads and sandalwood adding deep royal warmth.
settings.base_note_desc: A long-lasting drydown of natural mogra blossoms and sandalwood staying over 24 hours.
settings.best_suited: Daily wear, festive celebrations, royal occasions, and evening gatherings.

settings.title: How We Distill Our Pure Attars
settings.subtitle: CRAFTSMANSHIP & HERITAGE
settings.step_1_desc: Fresh Mogra blossoms, Katcha Bel, and Kesar are hand-picked at dawn in Kannauj when scent concentration is highest.
settings.step_2_desc: Natural flowers are sealed in copper pots (Degs) with clay and heated over traditional wood-fire furnaces.
settings.step_3_desc: Pure fragrant steam condenses into cold clay receivers (Bhapkas) containing sandalwood base oil. Zero alcohol, 100% pure.

settings.title: How To Apply Concentrated Attar
settings.subtitle: LONGEVITY GUIDE
settings.step_1_desc: Apply the perfume oil directly to pulse points (wrists, inner elbows, neck, and behind ears). Body heat diffuses the scent naturally.
settings.step_2_desc: Gently dab the oil on your skin. Never rub wrists together, as rubbing friction breaks down top note molecules.
settings.step_3_desc: Fragrance lasts significantly longer on moisturized skin. Apply unscented moisturizer to pulse points before dabbing.

settings.quote: This Set of 3 Attar Combo has a soul! Katcha Bel is super refreshing, Kesar Chandan feels royal, and Mogra lasts all night long. Must buy!
settings.author: Rohan Gupta

settings.quote: Pure concentrated oil without any sticky feeling or synthetic alcohol smell. Lasts over 24 hours on clothes. Kannauj craftsmanship at its best!
settings.author: Anjali Sen

settings.quote: 100% alcohol-free so it doesn't dry my skin. Delivered in 3 days with COD. 5 stars for packaging and scent quality!
settings.author: Vikram Singh
